subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Praise be unto God that from Sarvistán the sweet fragrances of the rose-garden of the love of God are wafting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء الحمد لله از سروستان نفحات گلستان محبت الله منتشر و رایحه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
